creator: devin.teske@fisglobal.com
text:
I've re-worked the originally submitted patch.txt in the following ways:

+ Added a new support function "contains?" for determining if a word exists within a string (case-insensitive). This allows satisfaction of the requirement to support the case of console="vidconsole comconsole".

+ Optimized "set_serial_charset" to minimize code duplication.

I tested this with 9.0-R.

Plan to commit to HEAD after review.
-- 
Devin
